'''Marty''' was the [[Deck officer/Legends|deck officer]] aboard the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Defense Force]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']] as staff officer to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]] for the duration of the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet's]] deployment in the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

He greeted General [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] onboard upon his arrival prior to the Fifth Fleet's departure from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and also greeted General A'Baht upon his return warning him of General Solo's presence onboard.
